goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range and should serve 'turkish' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '3 people' at '20:00' on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be 'in the same area as the restaurant' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should serve turkish food
The restaurant should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 20:00 on thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the same price range as the restaurant
Make sure you get star of the hotel and postcode
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
